name: Quiz

unions.name: ConfigBuilder
Difficulty
unions.comment:
Difficulty settings

The difficulties are:
`Easy`
`Normal`
`Hard`
`Speedy`
`Impossible`

Difficulties can be set in the json config.
The values are then the lower cased representation.

        Easy -- "easy"
        Normal -- "normal"
        -- etc

With setDifficulty you can set those difficulties:

        Quiz.setDifficulty Quiz.Easy configBuilder

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: An opaque type representing messages that are passed inside the Quiz.

subscriptions
